metadata.description: Hitachi EX-N01A Design Patterns extracted from expert notes

patterns.name: Standard PID Control
patterns.description: Basic regulation loop using F05 CPID.

patterns.name: Ratio Control
patterns.description: Maintains a fixed ratio between two flows. F28 calculates SV for F05.
patterns.expert_tip: Use K to normalize ranges so SV remains near 1.0.

patterns.name: Split Range Control
patterns.description: One PID controlling two valves (e.g., Heating/Cooling) via F18 ACNV.
safety_notes: Ensure deadband at the 50% switch point to prevent valve oscillation.

patterns.name: Bumpless Transfer Sync
patterns.description: Ensures smooth transition between Manual/Auto or SEQ/PID.
